problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: If Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
